description: Location mentions extracted from the text

mentions.textRef: a river going out from Eden
sent out from the Garden of Eden
east of the Garden of Eden
Assyria, from which he went forth
as far as Lasha, border of Canaan
Valley of Siddim, the Salt Sea
Valley of Shaveh, the King's Valley
if I find in Sodom fifty righteous
the two angels came to Sodom
Lot sitting in the gate of Sodom
the name of the city was called Zoar
he was afraid to dwell in Zoar
returned to the land of the Philistines
sojourned in the land of the Philistines
cave of the field of Machpelah
dwelling in the land of the Negev
until I come to my lord in Seir
sons of Hamor father of Shechem
Shechem son of Hamor, prince of the land
let us go up to Bethel
Jacob came to Luz, that is Bethel
wives from the daughters of Canaan
born to him in the land of Canaan
acquired in the land of Canaan
kings who reigned in the land of Edom
sent from the valley of Hebron
sold him into Egypt to Potiphar
turned aside to an Adullamite man
went up to Timnah for sheep-shearing
your father-in-law goes up to Timnah
sat at the entrance to Enaim
Joseph was brought down to Egypt
cupbearer of the king of Egypt
who belonged to the king of Egypt
in all the land of Egypt (describing the ugly cows)
great abundance in all the land of Egypt
abundance forgotten in the land of Egypt
set a wise man over the land of Egypt
take a fifth of the land of Egypt
food reserve for the land of Egypt during famine
Joseph set over all the land of Egypt
ruler over all the land of Egypt
no one shall lift hand or foot in all the land of Egypt
On (Heliopolis), city of Joseph's father-in-law Potiphera the priest
Joseph went out over the land of Egypt
Joseph passed through all the land of Egypt
gathered food during seven years in the land of Egypt
On (Heliopolis), Asenath daughter of Potiphera priest of On
seven years of abundance in the land of Egypt ended
in all the land of Egypt there was bread
all the land of Egypt was famished
Pharaoh told all Egypt to go to Joseph
Joseph sold grain to the Egyptians
famine was severe in the land of Egypt
all the earth came to Egypt (mitserayemah) to buy grain
Jacob heard there was grain in Egypt
I have heard there is grain in Egypt
Joseph's brothers went down to buy grain from Egypt
famine was in the land of Canaan
brothers said they came from the land of Canaan
your servants are sons of one man in the land of Canaan
brothers returned to Jacob in the land of Canaan
the youngest is with our father in the land of Canaan
when they finished eating the grain brought from Egypt
brothers went down to Egypt and stood before Joseph
eating with Hebrews is an abomination to Egypt
we brought back silver from the land of Canaan
I am Joseph whom you sold into Egypt
ruler over all the land of Egypt
God has made me lord of all Egypt
you shall dwell in the land of Goshen
tell my father of all my glory in Egypt
go to the land of Canaan
I will give you the good of the land of Egypt
take wagons from the land of Egypt
the good of all the land of Egypt is yours
ten donkeys loaded with the good things of Egypt
they went up out of Egypt
they came to the land of Canaan to Jacob
Joseph is ruler over all the land of Egypt
